# Feature: User Authentication

## Description
Implement authentication so that users must log in to sign up for or manage activities. This can be via email/password, OAuth, or another secure method.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users must log in to access the system.
- Authentication is secure and session-based.
- User identity is used for signups and role assignment.

## Motivation
Authentication is required for accountability and to enable user-specific features like roles and dashboards.
